title: https://github.com/podman-container-tools/skopeo/releases/tag/v1.23.0
body:
is v1.23.0 published on quay.io?


Renovate doenst see it:

```
Dockerfile (2)
quay.io/skopeo/stable v1.22.2
```

comments.body: Thanks for reaching out. The stable images follow Fedora stable releases — and due to the config file changes and the relationship to Podman 6.0, Skopeo 1.23.0 has not been in pushed to a Fedora stable release, and that might not happen for several months. We are still discussing whether to change the mechanism/rules for publishing the container images.
I see. I'll stick with plug&play at 1.22 and keep the next _minor_ pending.
